description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default runner image and runs a before_script to install sbt via apt: apt-get update -y, apt-get install apt-transport-https -y, echo "deb http://dl.bintray.com/sbt/debian /" | tee -a /etc/apt/sources.list.d/sbt.list, apt-key adv --keyserver hkp://keyserver.ubuntu.com:80 --recv 642AC823, apt-get update -y, apt-get install sbt -y, and verify the sbt version with sbt sbt-version. Define a single job named test in the default test stage that executes sbt clean coverage test coverageReport. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are required.
